title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Narayana Health South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Narayana Health South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at Narayana Health South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Tiruchirappalli. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Narayana Health South Asia Partners:
Narayana Health South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health South Asia Partners!
